betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §5Ritual of Gaia's Transformation§r is the Blood Magic way of changing biomes. It consists of 116 Ritual Stones, including the Dusk ones, and requires an §9Awakened Activation Crystal§r.

To use the ritual, simply activate it, and it will transform an area up to 21x21. Yep. Just that easy.

What, you do not want Ocean? Are you too good for the ocean?

Whatever. If you want to change the biome you get from the ritual, use Arcane Plinths. The ritual consumes the items placed on them to increase or decrease humidity or temperature. You can also use Bloodstone or Bloodstone Brick to define an area.

Once you have used the items to reach your desired environment, the ritual will give you a biome from it. If there are multiple biomes with that humidity and temperature, you can use wool to determine the exact one, for up to 17 conflicting biomes.

Some cool ones include, but are not limited to:

- Sky (also known as End) -> Orange Wool
- Eldritch -> Cyan Wool
- Eerie -> Light Gray Wool
- TF Forest -> Pink Wool
- Sacred Springs -> Yellow Wool
- Tainted Land -> Purple or Blue Wool
- Moon -> 0% Humidity, No Wool
- Mars Flat -> 0% Humidity, White Wool
- Asteroids -> 0% Humidity, Orange Wool
- Space -> 0% Humidity, Magenta Wool
- Toxic Everglades -> 70% Humidity, No Wool
